hero.title: Operational Intelligence for
hero.lede: Unify planning, execution, risk management, and workforce analytics into a single command center.

features.title: Context, execution, and
features.subtitle: Project Ops 360° forgets nothing. Every meeting, change, and decision is logged as project intelligence.

memory.title: Project Memory
memory.desc: Decisions, minutes, and lessons learned become searchable knowledge. Your project never forgets the "why".

governance.title: Governance & Charter
governance.desc: Define scope, approvals, a RACI matrix, and success criteria before you start. Everything aligned from day one.

framework.title: Adaptive Framework
framework.desc: AI recommends the best approach (Agile, Waterfall, or Hybrid) based on uncertainty and stakeholders.

teams.title: Teams & Roles
teams.desc: Build teams with internal members, vendors, and externals. Specific permissions and a RACI everyone can see.

command.title: Command Center
command.desc: A unified view of health, blockers, risks, approvals, and scope-drift alerts in real time.

reporting.title: Smart Reporting
reporting.desc: Generate business-language reports that connect progress to the original strategy. No jargon.

workflow.title: From idea to delivery with
workflow.subtitle: Built for PMOs, consultancies, and data teams that need clarity, accountability, and adaptability.

create.title: Create the project
create.desc: Start in your personal or company space. Billing and members are managed at the workspace level.

charter.title: Define the charter
charter.desc: Capture objectives, scope, deliverables, constraints, and the approval flow.

framework.title: Choose the framework
framework.desc: AI recommends the best approach (Agile, Waterfall, or Hybrid) for your project.

team.title: Build the team
team.desc: Add internals, full teams, vendors, and stakeholders with clear roles and permissions.

execute.title: Execute, report, and learn
execute.desc: Every task, meeting, risk, and change is recorded in the project memory.

testimonial.quote: We finally stopped digging through email threads for the reasoning behind every decision. The project memory became our single source of truth.
testimonial.name: María Restrepo

teams.title: Flexible for founders, robust for
teams.subtitle: Billing is per workspace. External stakeholders participate without needing to be paid users.

solo.desc: Manage personal projects, backlog, and planning with AI—no corporate complexity.

small.desc: Create reusable teams, assign roles, and track multiple active projects.

pmo.title: PMO / Company
pmo.desc: Governance, stakeholder reporting, approval flows, and drift detection.

enterprise.title: Enterprise

pricing.subtitle: Scale from solo to multinational. Pay per internal user.

personal.name: Personal
personal.desc: For validating projects, students, or founders.

team.name: Team
team.desc: For startups and small teams with shared visibility.

business.name: Business / PMO

enterprise.name: Enterprise

security.title: Ready for regulated environments

items.a: You pay only for internal workspace users. External stakeholders participate, comment, and approve without taking up a paid license.
A searchable record of every decision, risk, minute, and change, linked to its context. When someone asks "why did we decide this?", the answer is one search away.

items.q: Can I combine Agile and Waterfall in the same project?
items.a: Yes. The adaptive framework supports hybrid approaches per phase, and AI suggests the best fit based on uncertainty and stakeholders.

items.q: When will it be publicly available?
items.a: We are in private beta with a small group of teams. Request early access and we will notify you as soon as we open your spot.

cta.title: Give your project a foundation, a team, and memory that never fades
cta.desc: Join the private beta of the execution platform that understands your business context.
